message:
fix(runtime): replace fire-and-forget try_send with timeout-guarded reserve for native capture events

Harden native event enqueueing in the capture loop: replace the
fire-and-forget try_send on the native capture event channel with a
new enqueue_native_capture_event async helper that uses a bounded
10ms timeout reserve(). This prevents silent event drops when the
channel is at capacity and provides a clean false return for callers
to detect backpressure.

Handles both asupersync-runtime and standard tokio execution paths.
Also tighten the PaneDestroyed cursor lock scope by replacing an
explicit drop(cursors_guard) with a scope block, shortening the
lock lifetime. Replace direct .recv() in the flush loop with
mpsc_recv_option for runtime compatibility.

Add two unit tests: one verifying the success path and one confirming
false is returned when the channel is full.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
